case_title: BONNIE PAN VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY
